creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
This makes no sense to me.  Here is what happens with a few commands on my machine:

portsjail% pwd
/home/linimon/ports/default/devel/p5-Test-OpenLDAP
portsjail% make -V OPENLDAP_VER
24
portsjail% make -V RUN_DEPENDS
p5-Data-UUID>0:devel/p5-Data-UUID  p5-perl-ldap>0:net/p5-perl-ldap  /usr/local/libexec/slapd:net/openldap24-server :lang/perl5.26

What happens when you run "make -V OPENLDAP_VER" ?
